title: SkillsFuture Work-Study Certificate
text:
SkillsFuture Work-Study Certificate - SupportGoWhere
SkillsFuture Work-Study Certificate
Share link
Provides industry-relevant skills and knowledge related to discipline of study through a work-study arrangement for individuals.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Receive a sign-on incentive of S$5,000
Acquire relevant work experience and skills valued by the industry
Potential for skills-based wage increments and career advancement upon completion
Collapse all sections
About this support

Full-time employment with a competitive starting salary

Industry-recognised certificate upon completion

Sign-on incentive of S$5,000

Potential for skills-based wage increments and career advancement based on performance

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizens or Permanent Residents

Within 3 years of graduation from the Institute of Technical Education (ITE) and Polytechnics or the Operational Ready Date for full-time National Servicemen

How to apply?

Click here to navigate the programme summary and listing

Select the programme you are interested

Click the button "Click here to Apply"

Where can I find help?

View more details

SkillsFuture Hotline: 6785 5785

Call Centre Operating Hours:
Mondays to Fridays 
8.30 am to 5.30 pm 
Closed on Sat, Sun & Public Holidays

Submit an enquiry

SkillsFuture Singapore

1 Paya Lebar Link,

#08-08, Paya Lebar Quarter 2,

Singapore 408533

Scheme last updated 06 Nov 2025
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
